title: erigeron acris subsp. politus
intro: Erigeron acris subsp. politus, also known as the tall fleabane, is a perennial plant native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce fever. The medicinal properties of Erigeron acris subsp. politus have been shown to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used in traditional folk remedies to treat a range of ailments, including digestive issues and skin conditions.
